basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Data Entry Operator (DEO) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.aiims.edu. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Data Entry Operator (DEO) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Intermediate or 12th pass from recognized board with 2 years experience in data management work
qualification.details: Intermediate or 12th pass from a recognized board. 2 years of experience in data management work.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Data Entry Operator (DEO) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Data Entry Operator (DEO) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Data Entry Operator (DEO) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the AIIMS Delhi Data Entry Operator (DEO) post is 23rd July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the qualification required for the Data Entry Operator (DEO) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Intermediate or 12th grade from a recognized board and possess at least 2 years of experience in data management work to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Data Entry Operator (DEO) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Data Entry Operator (DEO) position in the All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the AIIMS Delhi Data Entry Operator (DEO) recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Data Entry Operator (DEO) role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Data Entry Operator (DEO) post will be as per the guidelines set by the Indian Council of Medical Research (ICMR).

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Data Entry Operator (DEO) position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Data Entry Operator (DEO) role at AIIMS Delhi involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the Data Entry Operator (DEO) post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Data Entry Operator (DEO) post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of AIIMS Delhi. The direct link will be available in the 'Important Links' section.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents, including a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates, along with the filled application form.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this Data Entry Operator (DEO) position?
faq.answer: The Data Entry Operator (DEO) position at AIIMS Delhi is a contract-based job.
